strategy_snapshot.topology: AWS Cloud + GenAI Layer (Bedrock) + Custom Silicon (Trainium 3) + Project Leo (Satellite)
strategy_snapshot.primary_vector: Vertical AI Utility (Silicon OEM) + Project Leo Connectivity vs Capex Burn
strategy_snapshot.fragile_point: $200B Capex vs AWS Growth Margin & FCF Compression
strategy_snapshot.core_thesis: Vertical integration (Trainium) decouples AI growth from Nvidia margin structure.

stop_loss_rules.fundamental_melt_down: AWS growth < 18% or CEO revises AI run-rate downwards
stop_loss_rules.macro_kill_switch: Project Leo delay beyond Q4 2026 or Yield > 5.2%
